title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Grant Thornton India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Grant Thornton India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grant Thornton India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Grant Thornton India:
Grant Thornton India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
